description_long: This is a rectangular woven picnic basket with a sturdy, arching handle attached at both ends. The basket features a tightly interlaced weave pattern with alternating horizontal bands of natural beige, deep purple, and reddish-brown hues, giving it a rustic and decorative appearance. The handle is thick and appears to be made from the same woven material as the basket, providing a comfortable grip for carrying. The interior is open and spacious, suitable for holding food, drinks, or other picnic essentials. There is no visible lid or closure mechanism, leaving the contents easily accessible. The overall construction suggests durability and practicality for outdoor use in parks or urban green spaces.
description: A rectangular, multicolored woven picnic basket with a thick arching handle and an open top, featuring decorative horizontal bands. The basket is sturdy and spacious, ideal for carrying items outdoors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the basket, the arching handle, and the decorative horizontal bands.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the double attachment points of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same woven pattern and handle structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and handle attachments.
attribute_handle_type: Single thick arching handle, fixed at both ends, woven from the same material as the basket.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, horizontal plain weave with alternating colored bands for decoration.
